_comment: SERVER-SIDE ONLY. Load only in app/api/. Lab 4 = Multi-Agent orchestration. Validated from the trace: the compound query must fan out to >=2 specialists and the reply must cover BOTH appointments and diet. prompt_ids resolve against content/prompts/test-prompts.json.

task-1.title: Compound query fans out to >=2 specialists
task-1.rationale: Orchestrator triages, then delegates the LOW-risk compound request to Follow-Up + Education and synthesises one grounded reply. Engineer rail asserts >=2 specialist tool-calls; Navigator/Builder submit a trace screenshot (facilitator confirms the count).
task-1.correct_fun_fact: Specialisation beats one giant prompt — small focused agents are easier to test, ground, and trust.

optional_challenge.title: Add a third specialist (Assessment or Enrollment & Linkage)
optional_challenge.rationale: Participant shows a third specialist firing on an appropriate question (symptom tracking, or program eligibility). Maps to the customer's 5-agent architecture.
optional_challenge.correct_fun_fact: You just rebuilt the shape of the customer's real Care Pal — five cooperating agents behind one friendly chat.
